_doc: Merged LLM call contract + output for Search Planner phase. Validated against live code 2026-03-23.

system_prompt_rules.identity_lock: every output query MUST contain brand and model. Never drift to sibling/competitor.
system_prompt_rules.tier_1_seed: return unchanged or trivial phrasing cleanup only. Do not restructure.
system_prompt_rules.tier_2_group_search: tighten redundant tokens, pick better search angle. Use target_fields to focus. Keep group intent.
system_prompt_rules.tier_3_key_search: use enrichment context (repeat_count, all_aliases, domain_hints, preferred_content_types, domains_tried, content_types_tried) to craft materially different queries.
system_prompt_rules.tier_3a_repeat_0: first attempt. Pick best alias combination for a clean first search.
system_prompt_rules.tier_3b_repeat_1: aliases available. Use DIFFERENT alias combination than the base query.
system_prompt_rules.tier_3c_repeat_2: domain hints available. Add an UNTRIED domain as a bias term. Do NOT repeat domains_tried.
system_prompt_rules.tier_3d_repeat_3_plus: get creative. Vary phrasing family (teardown, benchmark, measured, review, spec sheet, comparison). Use untried content types and domain hints.
system_prompt_rules.history: query_history shows prior queries. Do NOT repeat them or trivial rewrites.

rows.query: deterministic query string from Search Profile

_tier3_only_fields.all_aliases: string[] (up to 8 aliases for this field)
_tier3_only_fields.domains_tried: string[] (domains already searched for this key)
_tier3_only_fields.content_types_tried: string[] (content types already tried for this key)

post_processing: response must have exactly N entries matching input row count
each enhanced query is normalized (trim, collapse whitespace)
per-row identity lock check: enhanced query must contain brand + model tokens
rows failing identity lock keep their original query (no _llm suffix)

row_shape.hint_source: original_llm when enhanced, original value when fallback
row_shape.original_query: pre-enhancement query (only present on LLM-enhanced rows)

runtime_events.search_plan_generated: emitted when source is llm and enhancedRows has entries
